title: Real-time visualization and coefficient updates
summary:
This week I added real-time monitoring to Glassbox. I created the ONNVisualizer so I can see what is happening during training. It uses a dark theme with green, blue, and red colors to show node importance. It updates every 100ms.

I also added Tier 2 features like Beta-Decay for sparsity and a risk-seeking policy to jump out of local minima. I finished the coefficient finalization module too. It uses L-BFGS to prune small coefficients and simplify the math.

I tested it on sin(x) + x² and it gave me a clean formula with 99.99% correlation. The pruning at 0.15 threshold makes the output much easier to read. The training took about 40 seconds.
commitMessages: feat: Real-time visualization, Tier 2 research features, coefficient finalization
